title: Character Heights
wikitext:
[]: Character Heights             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Thu Apr 26, 2007 12:50 pm The height of the Evangelions is the subject of much debate. Much TIRED debate. Recently I've been wondering about the heights of the pilots. As we briefly see on her ID card, Misato is about 5'4". This, while slightly above average for Japanese women, isn't very tall. Throughout the show, it appears that she towers over Shinji. This would make Shinji almost comically short, like 5'0" or 4'11". The only mention of his height I remember is in Angelic Days when Asuka gives him a hard time about it, and even then there aren't any specifics. Asuka seems to be slightly taller than Shinji and Rei appears to be around the same height. Are any of their heights ever revealed in any Eva media?

[]: Re: Eva character heights             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Apr 26, 2007 12:57 pm Ayana-Me wrote: Asuka seems to be slightly taller than Shinji and Rei appears to be around the same height. Are any of their heights ever revealed in any Eva media?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Apr 26, 2007 1:10 pm teh Reichu wrote: Ikari Gendou - 184 (6') Kouzou Fuyutsuki - 183.5 (6') Kaji Ryouji - 178.5 (5'10") Aoba Shigeru - 176 (5'9") Hyuga Makoto - 174.5 (5'9") Ikari Yui - 169 (5'6") Katsuragi Misato - 163 (5'4") Akagi Naoko - 163 (5'4") Akagi Ritsuko - 162 (5'4") Ibuki Maya - 160 (5'3") Keel Lorenz - 159 (5'3") Suzuhara Touji - 151 (4'11") Hikari Horaki - 150 (4'11") Nagisa Kaworu - 150 (4'11") Sohryuu Asuka Langley - 149 (4'11") Ikari Shinji - 148 (4'10") Aida Kensuke - 145.25 (4'9") Ayanami Rei - 143 (4'8") Pen-Pen - 61.5 (2') Just by going by this one picture I have, Mayumi is Touji's height. And while I'm at it, Mana is perhaps 146cm.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Thu Apr 26, 2007 1:17 pm Mr. Tines wrote: teh Reichu wrote: Ikari Gendou - 184 (6') Kouzou Fuyutsuki - 183.5 (6') Kaji Ryouji - 178.5 (5'10") Aoba Shigeru - 176 (5'9") Hyuga Makoto - 174.5 (5'9") Ikari Yui - 169 (5'6") Katsuragi Misato - 163 (5'4") Akagi Naoko - 163 (5'4") Akagi Ritsuko - 162 (5'4") Ibuki Maya - 160 (5'3") Keel Lorenz - 159 (5'3") Suzuhara Touji - 151 (4'11") Hikari Horaki - 150 (4'11") Nagisa Kaworu - 150 (4'11") Sohryuu Asuka Langley - 149 (4'11") Ikari Shinji - 148 (4'10") Aida Kensuke - 145.25 (4'9") Ayanami Rei - 143 (4'8") Pen-Pen - 61.5 (2') Just by going by this one picture I have, Mayumi is Touji's height. And while I'm at it, Mana is perhaps 146cm.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Apr 26, 2007 4:02 pm I never knew Gendo was so tall. :shock: I always though Fuyutsuki was taller.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Apr 26, 2007 5:38 pm they're all midgets to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Thu Apr 26, 2007 6:50 pm slothen wrote: they're all midgets to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Apr 26, 2007 7:24 pm maybe they only made the adults taller to show that they were older

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 26, 2007 7:39 pm I ought to double-check those results sometime when I feel like I have nothing better to do. Does that list Tines posted figure in my revised height for Yui? (Posted in one of them threads.) First time I calculated it, I didn't take her high heels into account. -_-;

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 27, 2007 1:12 am slothen wrote: they're all midgets to me.

[]: Re: Eva character heights             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Fri Apr 27, 2007 3:22 am Reichu really did it ? Nice job Miss

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Apr 30, 2007 9:29 pm Mr. Tines wrote: The Japanese are all just little guys.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Apr 30, 2007 9:31 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: The Japanese are all just little guys.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Tue May 01, 2007 7:27 pm slothen wrote: Sachiel_13 wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: The Japanese are all just little guys.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Tue May 01, 2007 8:41 pm It doesn't seem like the shortness is exclusive to the Japanese characters, Keel Lorentz is only 5'3". Asuka is only 4'11", but maybe that's just that 25% Japanese heritage coming out. At any rate, it looks like Rei will eventually have to invest in some pumps...

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue May 01, 2007 8:47 pm I find those heights to be somewhat dubious. I mean, Shinji, a 14 year old boy only 4'10"? Give me a break. This is most likely a case of the characters being as tall as necessary to fit into a certain scene or "camera angle." I imagine their heights are about as consistent as the heights of the Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue May 01, 2007 9:05 pm BrikHaus wrote: I find those heights to be somewhat dubious. I mean, Shinji, a 14 year old boy only 4'10"? Give me a break. This is most likely a case of the characters being as tall as necessary to fit into a certain scene or "camera angle." I imagine their heights are about as consistent as the heights of the Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Tue May 01, 2007 9:06 pm They probably don't have real heights, 4'10 is not realistic at all for a 14 year old, seriously. We can't trust any official GAINAX info for heights anyway, an EVA unit can go from towering over the city to climbing up a building 3 times it's size.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue May 01, 2007 10:25 pm Zkh wrote: We can't trust any official GAINAX info for heights anyway, an EVA unit can go from towering over the city to climbing up a building 3 times it's size.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 01, 2007 10:58 pm BrikHaus wrote: I imagine their heights are about as consistent as the heights of the Evas.

Article: Character Heights
 Keel Lorentz is only 5'3". Asuka is only 4'11", but maybe that's just that 25% Japanese heritage coming out. At any rate, it looks like Rei will eventually have to invest in some pumps...

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue May 01, 2007 8:47 pm I find those heights to be somewhat dubious. I mean, Shinji, a 14 year old boy only 4'10"? Give me a break. This is most likely a case of the characters being as tall as necessary to fit into a certain scene or "camera angle." I imagine their heights are about as consistent as the heights of the Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue May 01, 2007 9:05 pm BrikHaus wrote: I find those heights to be somewhat dubious. I mean, Shinji, a 14 year old boy only 4'10"? Give me a break. This is most likely a case of the characters being as tall as necessary to fit into a certain scene or "camera angle." I imagine their heights are about as consistent as the heights of the Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Tue May 01, 2007 9:06 pm They probably don't have real heights, 4'10 is not realistic at all for a 14 year old, seriously. We can't trust any official GAINAX info for heights anyway, an EVA unit can go from towering over the city to climbing up a building 3 times it's size.
